title: VimFu — :[range]t {address} — Copy (Synonym)
description: The :t command is a synonym for :co. It copies lines. Think of t as meaning 'to'. :3t 7 copies line 3 to after line 7.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
line 1 — preheat oven
line 2 — mix flour
line 3 — add eggs
line 4 — stir well
line 5 — pour batter
line 6 — bake 30 min
line 7 — let cool

steps.say: Colon T is the same as colon C O. It copies lines. T stands for to. Copy this line to there.
Colon four t seven. Copy line four to after line seven.
Stir well is duplicated at the bottom. The original is still on line four.
A common pattern. Colon t dollar. Duplicate the current line to the end of the file.
Line three was copied to the very end. T dollar is quick and handy.
Colon T. Same as colon C O but shorter to type. Many Vim users prefer it.
